title: hordeum californicum
intro: Hordeum californicum, also known as California barley or wild barley, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hordeum californicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Hordeum californicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to a holistic health regimen.
